description: Generate a new image from a natural-language prompt, or edit a provided input image, via an OpenRouter image model (default google/gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview).
rules: read-only with respect to local state; calls the OpenRouter API over the network
requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY (or a .env with it); without it (or offline) the porter degrades and writes an empty placeholder output
if INPUT_IMAGE is set the prompt is treated as an edit instruction on that image; otherwise it generates a new image
output PNG is written under record_store
usage: Set PROMPT (image description or edit instruction), OUTPUT_NAME (e.g. image.png), optional MODEL (OpenRouter model id), optional INPUT_IMAGE (path to edit), and OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: ${RECORD_STORE}/${OUTPUT_NAME}.
limitation: Needs OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network access to produce a real image; offline it only creates an empty placeholder. python3 must have the requests library for live generation.

vars.PROMPT: Photorealistic illustration of a laboratory bench with microscope
